mods.name: Firestorm Core
mods.desc: The main mod — storm engine, dynamic particles and in-game config.

notes: Fixed particle desync when playing on servers
Added support for Minecraft 1.21.6
Reduced idle memory use of the storm engine
New storm intensity system with per-biome settings
Three new particle sets: ash, ember drift, ion haze
Updated to Cloth Config 15
Fixed crash when disabling storms mid-world
Corrected config reset on version upgrade
Storm scheduling API for pack makers
Performance pass on particle culling
Dropped 1.20.x support

mods.name: Firestorm Extras
mods.desc: Add-on content packs, extra particle sets and compatibility patches for Core.

notes: Added the aurora particle pack
New config toggle for reduced-motion mode
Compatibility patch for Sodium 0.6
Fixed missing textures on the ember pack
Minor performance pass
First release of the ember particle pack
Split extras out of Core

mods.name: Firestorm Lite
mods.desc: A lightweight, particle-only build for low-end machines and large servers.

notes: Trimmed the storm engine to particles only
No config dependency required
Backported to 1.20.4
Fixed a rare crash on world load
Lowered default particle cap

modpacks.name: Firestorm Essentials
modpacks.desc: Core and Extras pre-configured together — the recommended starting point.

modpacks.name: Firestorm Performance
modpacks.desc: Firestorm Lite with Sodium-friendly defaults for low-end machines and large servers.

wips.name: Stormlink
wips.note: Syncs storm effects between linked servers. Networking works; config UI unfinished.

wips.name: Firestorm 3.0
wips.note: Ground-up rewrite for better performance on large servers. No public build yet.

updates.title: Server particle fix + MC 1.21.6
updates.body: Particle desync on servers is finally fixed — thanks to everyone who sent logs. This build also adds 1.21.6 support and trims idle memory use.

updates.title: Stormlink preview 4 is out
updates.body: Cross-server sync now survives reconnects. Config UI is next — try it from the WIPs page and report anything odd on the bug tracker.

updates.title: Storm engine 2.4
updates.body: New storm intensity system, three new particle sets, and Cloth Config 15 support. See the full changelog on the downloads page.

source.name: firestorm-core
source.desc: Main mod — storm engine, particles and config.

source.name: firestorm-extras
source.desc: Add-on content packs and compatibility patches.

site.name: FirestormFMD
site.title: FirestormFMD
site.tagline: Mods, tools and updates for Minecraft — everything beyond the Modrinth page lives here.

bugs.title: Storm audio stutters with Sodium 0.6 on some AMD cards
Ion haze particles render through walls
Config screen crash without Mod Menu installed
Particle desync on servers with >50 players
Storms ignore per-biome intensity in the End
Memory leak after long play sessions
